case_title: ALFREDO DEL CID GONZALEZ VS. V.M. JANITOR COMPANY AKA CLEANING MAINTENANCE, A et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL CID GONZALEZ, ALFREDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT V.M. JANITOR COMPANY AKA CLEANING MAINTENANCE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MACIEL MATA, VENANCIO INDIVIDUALLY  AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF V.M. JANITOR COMPANY AKA VM CLEANING MAINTENANCE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MACIEL, CARLOS INDIVIDUALLY  AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF  V.M. JANITOR COMPANY AKA VM CLEANING MAINTENANCE, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $2,410.28 PRINCIPAL, $7.84 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,643.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
